aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has strong local relevance, it lacks the conversational and structured content needed for AI assistants to confidently cite or recommend it as a top choice.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks or repairs.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but it lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve search presence.
Q&A section is inactive, missing opportunities for customer interaction and keyword targeting.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and listings.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema beyond basic JSON-LD.
No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No HowTo schema for explaining HVAC services or repairs.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: ‘Emergency AC repair near me’ and similar high-intent local search queries.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert by adding HowTo schema and detailed service explanations.

agency_pitch.hook: Get cited by AI assistants and capture 40% more leads with our AEO strategy.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they’re missing out on high-intent local search traffic and potential customers who rely on AI for recommendations.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: We’ll implement targeted schema markup, FAQ content, and GBP optimization to make your business stand out to AI models and capture more leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: AI adoption is accelerating—waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for your HVAC business in Pasadena
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI search and assistant technologies.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Lewis Air Conditioning Repair - Pasadena, CA
